name: Feature request
about: A product idea for a future post-portfolio enhancement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What pain or opportunity is this idea addressing? Who is the user?

## Proposed solution

What should the product do? Keep it small and concrete.

## Out of scope (for this idea)

What should the product not do as part of this idea? Naming the boundary helps reviewers.

## Portfolio relevance

If this idea would strengthen the UTS Master of AI portfolio story, say so explicitly. Otherwise it goes into the post-portfolio backlog.

## Estimated effort

1 hour / 1 evening / 1 week / 1 month / a separate project.

## Risks

Schema migration, breaking API change, security boundary, provider lock-in, real-money handling.
